steps.title: Identify the contrast in Green's responses
steps.content: Green found the 2016 version confusing but praised the 2019 version enthusiastically. The words “However” and “This suggests” signal that the passage is pointing to a change in the show itself that explains the shift in his reaction.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly explains the shift in Green's reaction — if the storytelling improved from 2016 to 2019, his assessment would naturally change from confused to enthusiastically praised. The others either claim the earlier version was better or miss the storytelling issue that the passage emphasizes. That matches choice D — D is correct.
